en.name: Monkey.D.Luffy
en.effectText: [When Attacking] If you have 2 or less Life cards, draw 1 card and trash 1 card from your hand.

jp.name: モンキー・Ｄ・ルフィ
jp.effectText: 【アタック時】自分のライフが2枚以下の場合、カード1枚を引き、自分の手札1枚を捨てる。

definition.name: Monkey.D.Luffy
definition.text: [When Attacking] If you have 2 or less Life cards, draw 1 card and trash 1 card from your hand.

en.name: Usopp
en.effectText: [On Play]/[When Attacking] Rest up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost equal to or less than the number of your opponent's Life cards.

jp.name: ウソップ
jp.effectText: 【登場時】/【アタック時】相手のライフの枚数以下のコストを持つ相手のキャラ1枚までを、レストにする。

definition.name: Usopp
definition.text: [On Play]/[When Attacking] Rest up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost equal to or less than the number of your opponent's Life cards.

en.name: Kaku
en.effectText: If the number of your Life cards is equal to or less than the number of your opponent's Life cards, this Character gains +1000 power. [Trigger] K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 3 or less.

jp.name: カク
jp.effectText: 自分のライフの枚数が相手のライフの枚数以下の場合、このキャラのパワー+1000。 【トリガー】相手のコスト3以下のキャラ1枚までを、KOする。

definition.name: Kaku
definition.text: If the number of your Life cards is equal to or less than the number of your opponent's Life cards, this Character gains +1000 power. [Trigger] K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 3 or less.

en.name: Sanji
en.effectText: [On Play] Look at 4 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 {Straw Hat Crew} type card and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order. [Trigger] You may trash 1 card from your hand: Play this card.

jp.name: サンジ
jp.effectText: 【登場時】自分のデッキの上から4枚を見て、特徴《麦わらの一味》を持つカード1枚までを公開し、手札に加える。その後、残りを好きな順番でデッキの下に置く。 【トリガー】自分の手札1枚を捨てることができる：このカードを登場させる。

definition.name: Sanji
definition.text: [On Play] Look at 4 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 {Straw Hat Crew} type card and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order. [Trigger] You may trash 1 card from your hand: Play this card.

en.name: Jinbe
en.effectText: [Trigger] If your Leader is [Monkey.D.Luffy], play this card.

jp.name: ジンベエ
jp.effectText: 【トリガー】自分のリーダーが「モンキー・Ｄ・ルフィ」の場合、このカードを登場させる。

definition.name: Jinbe
definition.text: [Trigger] If your Leader is [Monkey.D.Luffy], play this card.

en.name: Tony Tony.Chopper
en.effectText: [On K.O.] You may add 1 card from the top or bottom of your Life cards to your hand: Add up to 1 card from your hand to the top of your Life cards. [Trigger] Up to 1 of your [Monkey.D.Luffy] cards gains +2000 power during this turn.

jp.name: トニートニー・チョッパー
jp.effectText: 【KO時】自分のライフの上か下から1枚を手札に加えることができる：自分の手札1枚までを、ライフの上に加える。 【トリガー】自分の「モンキー・Ｄ・ルフィ」を、このターン中、パワー+2000。

definition.name: Tony Tony.Chopper
definition.text: [On K.O.] You may add 1 card from the top or bottom of your Life cards to your hand: Add up to 1 card from your hand to the top of your Life cards. [Trigger] Up to 1 of your [Monkey.D.Luffy] cards gains +2000 power during this turn.

en.name: Nami
en.effectText: If your {Egghead} type Character would be K.O.'d by your opponent's effect, you may turn 1 card from the top of your Life cards face-up instead. [Trigger] If your Leader is [Monkey.D.Luffy], play this card.

jp.name: ナミ
jp.effectText: 自分の特徴《エッグヘッド》を持つキャラが相手の効果でKOされる場合、代わりに自分のライフの上から1枚を表向きにできる。 【トリガー】自分のリーダーが「モンキー・Ｄ・ルフィ」の場合、このカードを登場させる。

definition.name: Nami
definition.text: If your {Egghead} type Character would be K.O.'d by your opponent's effect, you may turn 1 card from the top of your Life cards face-up instead. [Trigger] If your Leader is [Monkey.D.Luffy], play this card.

en.name: Nico Robin
en.effectText: [Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.) [Trigger] If your Leader is [Monkey.D.Luffy], play this card.

jp.name: ニコ・ロビン
jp.effectText: 【ブロッカー】(相手のアタックの後、このカードをレストにし、アタックの対象をこのカードにできる) 【トリガー】自分のリーダーが「モンキー・Ｄ・ルフィ」の場合、このカードを登場させる。

definition.name: Nico Robin
definition.text: [Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.) [Trigger] If your Leader is [Monkey.D.Luffy], play this card.

en.name: Brook
en.effectText: [Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)

jp.name: ブルック
jp.effectText: 【ブロッカー】(相手のアタックの後、このカードをレストにし、アタックの対象をこのカードにできる)

definition.name: Brook
definition.text: [Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)

en.name: Monkey.D.Luffy
en.effectText: [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] Give up to 1 rested DON!! card to 1 of your [Monkey.D.Luffy] cards. [Trigger] Play this card.

jp.name: モンキー・Ｄ・ルフィ
jp.effectText: 【起動メイン】【ターン1回】自分の「モンキー・D・ルフィ」1枚にレストのドン‼1枚までを、付与する。 【トリガー】このカードを登場させる。

definition.name: Monkey.D.Luffy
definition.text: [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] Give up to 1 rested DON!! card to 1 of your [Monkey.D.Luffy] cards. [Trigger] Play this card.

en.name: Rob Lucci
en.effectText: [Trigger] K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost equal to or less than the total of your and your opponent's Life cards.

jp.name: ロブ・ルッチ
jp.effectText: 【トリガー】お互いのライフの合計枚数以下のコストを持つ相手のキャラ1枚までを、KOする。

definition.name: Rob Lucci
definition.text: [Trigger] K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost equal to or less than the total of your and your opponent's Life cards.

en.name: Roronoa Zoro
en.effectText: [Rush: Character] (This card can attack Characters on the turn in which it is played.)[Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] You may trash 1 card with a [Trigger] from your hand: Draw 1 card and give up to 1 rested DON!! card to your Leader or 1 of your Characters.

jp.name: ロロノア・ゾロ
jp.effectText: 【速攻：キャラ】(このカードは登場したターンにキャラへアタックできる)【起動メイン】【ターン1回】自分の手札から【トリガー】を持つカード1枚を捨てることができる：カード1枚を引き、自分のリーダーかキャラ1枚にレストのドン‼1枚までを、付与する。

definition.name: Roronoa Zoro
definition.text: [Rush: Character] (This card can attack Characters on the turn in which it is played.)[Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] You may trash 1 card with a [Trigger] from your hand: Draw 1 card and give up to 1 rested DON!! card to your Leader or 1 of your Characters.

en.name: Raw Heat Strike
en.effectText: [Counter] Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +2000 power during this battle. Then, if you have 1 or less Life cards, give up to 1 of your opponent's Leader or Character cards −2000 power during this turn. [Trigger] Draw 1 card.

jp.name: 温度レアァストライク!!!
jp.effectText: 【カウンター】自分のリーダーかキャラ1枚までを、このバトル中、パワー+2000。その後、自分のライフが1枚以下の場合、相手のリーダーかキャラ1枚までを、このターン中、パワー-2000。 【トリガー】カード1枚を引く。

definition.name: Raw Heat Strike
definition.text: [Counter] Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +2000 power during this battle. Then, if you have 1 or less Life cards, give up to 1 of your opponent's Leader or Character cards −2000 power during this turn. [Trigger] Draw 1 card.

en.name: Kizaru!! Compared to Two Years Ago We're a Hundred Times Stronger Now!!
en.effectText: [Main] Your [Monkey.D.Luffy] Leader gains [Unblockable] during this turn.(This card cannot be blocked.)[Counter] Your Leader gains +3000 power during this battle.

jp.name: 黄猿‼おれ達は2年前の100倍強ェぞ
jp.effectText: 【メイン】自分の「モンキー・Ｄ・ルフィ」1枚までは、このターン中、【ブロック不可】を得る。(このカードはブロックされない)【カウンター】自分のリーダーを、このバトル中、パワー+3000。

definition.name: Kizaru!! Compared to Two Years Ago We're a Hundred Times Stronger Now!!
definition.text: [Main] Your [Monkey.D.Luffy] Leader gains [Unblockable] during this turn.(This card cannot be blocked.)[Counter] Your Leader gains +3000 power during this battle.

en.name: Iai Death Lion Song
en.effectText: [Counter] Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +4000 power during this battle. Then, if you have 2 or less Life cards, K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 3 or less. [Trigger] Draw 2 cards and trash 1 card from your hand.

jp.name: 死・獅子歌歌
jp.effectText: 【カウンター】自分のリーダーかキャラ1枚までを、このバトル中、パワー+4000。その後、自分のライフが2枚以下の場合、相手のコスト3以下のキャラ1枚までを、KOする。 【トリガー】カード2枚を引き、自分の手札1枚を捨てる。

definition.name: Iai Death Lion Song
definition.text: [Counter] Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +4000 power during this battle. Then, if you have 2 or less Life cards, K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 3 or less. [Trigger] Draw 2 cards and trash 1 card from your hand.
